description: Prefiled. Referred to Committee on Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Mining. To printer.
From printer.

From printer. To reengrossment. Reengrossed. Second reprint. To Senate. In Senate. Read first time. Referred to Committee on Natural Resources. To committee.
